TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Paiwan Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://pwn.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_pwn, title = {Paiwan Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://pwn.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: nua sebaljak aicu a rak in rul mavan a masanitalj a sikudakuda tua pazaingan ka temagilj a kemasi qadjav a caviljan a 1940 a patje caviljan a 1960. kinasizuan a sizaingan nua inavrikan a binaljakan (African-American) tua rak in rul avan a djaz , r katua b , bugi wugi (boogie woogie), guspil . ljaki sema piyanu , ljaki sema saksevung , a namasantjaljapazangal a sipazaizaing tua tjaisangasangas a sizaingan nua rak in rul tazua. katjaiviliviljitjen a patagilj a sema gitar a pazaing tua rak in rul kamasi qadjav a caviljan a 1955. == kaizuan ==
S.PHON: nua s…ôba éak ai ¶u a rak in ru…≠ mavan a masanita é a sikudakuda tua pazaiŇčan ka t…ômagi é a k…ômasi qa…Čav a ¶avi éan a **** a pa ¶…ô ¶avi éan a ****. kinasizuan a sizaiŇčan nua inavrikan a bina éakan (a*ri ¶an-am…ôri ¶an) tua rak in ru…≠ avan a …Čaz , r katua b , bugi wugi (buugi…ô wuugi…ô), guspi…≠ . éaki s…ôma pijanu , éaki s…ôma saks…ôvuŇč , a namasan ¶a éapazaŇča…≠ a sipazaizaiŇč tua ¶aisaŇčasaŇčas a sizaiŇčan nua rak in ru…≠ tazua. ka ¶aivi…≠ivi éi ¶…ôn a patagi é a s…ôma gitar a pazaiŇč tua rak in ru…≠ kamasi qa…Čav a ¶avi éan a ****. == kaizuan ==
S.FORM: nua sebaljak aicu a rak in rul mavan a masanitalj a sikudakuda tua pazaingan ka temagilj a kemasi qadjav a caviljan a 1940 a patje caviljan a 1960. kinasizuan a sizaingan nua inavrikan a binaljakan (African-American) tua rak in rul avan a djaz , r katua b , bugi wugi (boogie woogie), guspil . ljaki sema piyanu , ljaki sema saksevung , a namasantjaljapazangal a sipazaizaing tua tjaisangasangas a sizaingan nua rak in rul tazua. katjaiviliviljitjen a patagilj a sema gitar a pazaing tua rak in rul kamasi qadjav a caviljan a 1955. == kaizuan ==
